creator: rz-rpi03@h-ka.de
text:
Created attachment 204311
3rd version of if_muge patch to enable LEDs if FDT is used.

This version also uses the LED mode settings from the FDT to set the PHY.
It does not check if there is aRESERVED value returned from the FDT.
Now, at a 10 MB/s link, LED1, the green one, light up using the standard FDT blob.
Which it does not using the default value.
